---
name: coding
description: Use when implementing approved work in a hybrid Next.js TypeScript and Python ecosystem and applying coding conventions, error handling discipline, contract clarity, and maintainable module boundaries.
---

# Coding

Use this skill for implementation tasks.

Expectations:

- keep changes aligned with the approved design and implementation plan
- add or update tests for changed behavior
- keep module boundaries explicit
- handle failure cases intentionally
- keep logs and diagnostics useful
- keep Next.js UI, route, and server concerns separate from Python worker, ETL, or API concerns
- keep shared request and response contracts explicit at the boundary between TypeScript and Python

If the implementation reveals a better path that changes the approved plan, update the KB instead of leaving the divergence implicit.
